    Fields in software.amazon.lambda.durable.retry declared as WaitForConditionWaitStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final WaitForConditionWaitStrategy
    WaitStrategies.Presets.DEFAULT
    Default wait strategy: exponential backoff with 60 max attempts, 5s initial delay, 300s max delay, 1.5x backoff rate, and FULL jitter.
    Methods in software.amazon.lambda.durable.retry that return WaitForConditionWaitStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> WaitForConditionWaitStrategy<T>
    WaitStrategies.defaultStrategy()
    Returns the default wait strategy.
    static <T> WaitForConditionWaitStrategy<T>
    WaitStrategies.exponentialBackoff(int maxAttempts, Duration initialDelay, Duration maxDelay, double backoffRate, JitterStrategy jitter)
    Creates an exponential backoff wait strategy.
    static <T> WaitForConditionWaitStrategy<T>
    WaitStrategies.fixedDelay(int maxAttempts, Duration fixedDelay)
    Creates a fixed delay wait strategy that returns a constant delay regardless of attempt number or state.
